senses.gloss: weibliche Person: Person, die in einem geburtenstarken Jahrgang in der Nachkriegszeit geboren ist; Babyboomer
senses.gloss_en_full: A woman born during the post-World War II baby boom, typically between the mid-1940s and mid-1960s.

senses.gloss: weibliche Person: Person mit unzeitgemäßen, meist sehr konservativen Ansichten und Meinungen
senses.gloss_en_full: A woman perceived as holding outdated, overly conservative views and attitudes, often used dismissively by younger generations.
